query:
ALTER TABLE stage_field_definitions 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS labelEn VARCHAR(200) AFTER labelAr,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source ENUM('project_fact_sheet','manual_input','company_settings','ai_agent') DEFAULT 'manual_input' AFTER fieldType,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requiredLevel ENUM('required','optional','recommended') DEFAULT 'required' AFTER source,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stageGroup VARCHAR(100) AFTER requiredLevel,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT AFTER stageGroup;
